rule_source: Eriksson 2010 PLoS Genet 6:e1000993 + Pelchat 2011 Chem Senses 36:9 (near OR2M7)
caveats: self-reported label (not a lab assay) — PILOT/DEMO tier, like the eye-colour openSNP cell
deployed textbook rule -> a WIN validates the rule, it is not new biological signal
WEAK-EFFECT association by design (not Mendelian) -> near-chance is the CORRECT, honest outcome
